Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Regent]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — A Regent is mentioned as a potential target or subject of consideration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultants are investigating the death of a Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Benji and his group killed a Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — A Regent fought a Guild Head.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Loreli is a Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Regent Loreli assisted the Magister's Guild in making the crown's box.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — If the Regent finds Calder, he might end up in a Palace cell.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Regents are among the most powerful Readers to ever walk the earth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Regent asked Bareius for a report.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — The Regent is surrounded by a hazy gray light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Regent Loreli wears silver-and-white Luminian armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Loreli and Estyr are Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — The Regents handle Optasia business.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
